name: IRIDEX CORP
business: IRIDEX is an ophthalmic medical technology company developing and commercializing products and procedures to treat sight-threatening eye conditions, including glaucoma and retinal diseases. Its products consist of laser consoles, delivery devices, and consumable probes, including the Cyclo G6 laser system and MicroPulse Technology. The company generates recurring revenues through sales of consumable products and service contracts.

exposures.sentence: Our propriety MicroPulse Technology and Endpoint Management Technology are used for the treatment of glaucoma and retina disorders.
